mnemonics: CLICKS: Command Line, CLI, Kernel, Shell, GUI, System Calls
keyPoints: The OS provides interfaces like the CLI (Command Line Interface) and GUI (Graphical User Interface) for user interaction.
System calls provide a programming interface to the services of the operating system, acting as the bridge between user applications and the OS kernel.
The shell is a command interpreter that takes user commands from a CLI and translates them into system calls or other actions.
commonMistakes: Believing the GUI is the operating system itself, when it is merely one of many interfaces to it.
Confusing the shell (a user program) with the kernel (the core OS program), or thinking they are the same thing.
